subject: Introducing Learnist Collect
body:
** Introducing Learnist Collect
------------------------------------------------------------

Save and share the things you learn from around the web.
------------------------------------------------------------


** Collect what you learn
------------------------------------------------------------

Articles • Recipes • Travel Guides • Interesting facts • Inspiring content • Tips & Tutorials • How-tos
------------------------------------------------------------


** How to Collect
------------------------------------------------------------

First, download Learnist for iOS.
------------------------------------------------------------

Enable the iOS extension to add any URL to Learnist with a couple of clicks. Add a category and note what you learned. Save it for yourself and share it with the world.
Download Learnist for iOS now (https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/learnist-experts-curate-lessons/id826591175?mt=8)

Coming soon to the web & Android.
------------------------------------------------------------

Thanks for filling your brain with Learnist

© 2014, Learnist Inc. 500 3rd Street, Suite 260 San Francisco, CA 94107
